name: Walnut Creek Endoscopy and Surgery Center
services: colonoscopy, endoscopy, flexible sigmoidoscopy, esophagogastroduodenoscopy, capsule endoscopy, InterStim, pain management, ophthalmology
evidence: Facility website explicitly states AAAHC accreditation, and the facility won a 2025 AAAHC Kershner QI Award. No evidence found of Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation; no specific anesthesia director or named anesthesia group identified.

name: Blackhawk Surgery Center
anesthesia_details: Dr. Ronan works exclusively with a Board Certified Anesthesiologist for all surgeries. The center has added an anesthesiologist to staff but no named anesthesia group or medical director is mentioned.
evidence: Blackhawk Surgery Center is accredited by AAAASF (now QUAD A) and Medicare certified. Multiple website pages confirm AAAASF accreditation; no evidence found for AAAHC or Joint Commission accreditation.
notes: Part of Blackhawk Plastic Surgery & MedSpa, accredited by AAAASF and Medicare

name: BASS Surgery Center
evidence: Facility website states accreditation by AAAHC on multiple pages (home, about us, contact). Sitemap page also mentions QUAD A accreditation. No evidence of Joint Commission accreditation found.

name: DISC Surgery Center - Walnut Creek
services: interventional pain management, orthopedics, sports medicine, spine surgery
evidence: Pinnacle Surgery Center (now DISC Walnut Creek) was certified by Joint Commission prior to acquisition in 2023. DISC describes its centers as accredited facilities, and sister locations have AAAHC accreditation.

name: Walnut Creek Endoscopy Center
evidence: Facility explicitly states AAAHC accreditation on Sutter Health website and won 2025 AAAHC Kershner QI Award; no evidence of Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation.
notes: Separate facility from Walnut Creek Endoscopy and Surgery Center

name: Callista Surgery Center, LLC
evidence: Facility website and Golden State Plastic Surgery page both confirm AAAHC accreditation. No evidence found for Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation.
notes: Found via npino.com NPI registry search at nearby address 355 Lennon Lane (same building complex)

name: Premier Surgery Center
evidence: Dr. Mariotti's website confirms AAAASF (QUAD A) accreditation for Premier Surgery Center. No evidence of AAAHC or Joint Commission accreditation found.
notes: Same building as Diablo Plaza Surgery Center but different suite and phone

name: Gladstone Clinic
services: dermatologic surgery, cosmetic surgery, skin cancer treatment
evidence: No accreditation information found on facility website or in search results; QUAD A directory currently under construction. Facility performs procedures under local anesthesia with oral sedation, not general anesthesia requiring dedicated anesthesia providers.

name: Danville Oral Surgery Center
evidence: No accreditation evidence found for this facility; the center opened in Spring 2025 and no accreditation information appears on the website or in online directories searched.

name: Aspen Surgical Center
anesthesia_details: Facility website lists anesthesiologists from Medical Anesthesia Consultants, Inc., though this group reportedly ceased Northern California operations as of Jan 2023. Current anesthesia arrangement unclear.
evidence: A 2022 plastic surgery blog explicitly lists Aspen Surgery Center as AAAHC accredited. No evidence found for Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation.

name: San Ramon Endoscopy Center
evidence: Facility website states they are Medicare certified but does not mention AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A accreditation. No evidence found in online directories for any of these three accreditations.

name: Laser Surgical Center
evidence: The facility is Medicare-certified by CMS as an ambulatory surgical center with 3 operating rooms. No accreditation by AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A was found in searches or directory results.

name: Executive Surgical Center
evidence: Executive Surgery Center is Medicare/CMS certified but no specific accreditation by AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A was found in search results or directories.

name: Crow Canyon Surgical Center
evidence: The facility at this address (Executive Surgery Center) is Medicare-certified but no accreditation by AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A was found in available sources.
notes: Same address as Executive Surgical Center but different phone and name

name: Bay Area Surgical Specialist Services
anesthesia_details: Bay Area Surgical Specialist is a medical group practice specializing in Anesthesiology with named anesthesiologists including Dr. Jin Huang and Dr. Jay Hendrickson at this location.
evidence: BASS Surgery Center at 460 N Wiget Lane is accredited by AAAHC per their website and job postings. No evidence found of Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation.

name: Excelsior Surgery Center LLC
evidence: Providence Health Plan directory indicates accreditation status is not available; no accreditation confirmed through AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A searches or directories.
notes: Found on Providence Health Plan Directory at this address with distinct phone number 925-676-2600

name: TreSanti Surgery Center
anesthesia_details: Empire Anesthesia Inc is associated with this facility address and provides anesthesiology services at 5201 Norris Canyon Rd Ste 100.
evidence: The facility's website explicitly states they are accredited by Accreditation Association of Ambulatory Health Care (AAAHC). No evidence found for Joint Commission or QUAD A accreditation.

name: San Ramon Regional Medical Center Outpatient Surgery Center
services: Robotic surgery, minimally invasive spine surgery, joint surgery, general outpatient surgical procedures
anesthesia_details: Premier Anesthesia provides anesthesia services and is actively recruiting for a Medical Director position at this facility.
evidence: The hospital is accredited by The Joint Commission per their website. A physician mentions the Outpatient Surgery Center is AAAHC-accredited, though this cannot be independently confirmed for the specific facility.
notes: Found via San Ramon Regional Medical Center website - listed as separate Outpatient Surgery Center at same address. Also referenced on Leapfrog as AKA for San Ramon Endoscopy Center, but appears to be hospital-affiliated outpatient surgery center vs independent endoscopy center. Suite 210 NPI listing also found at this address.

name: Outpatient Surgery Center at San Ramon Regional Medical Center
anesthesia_details: Premier Anesthesia provides anesthesia services. A job posting was found for an Anesthesia Medical Director position at this facility through Premier Anesthesia, indicating an established relationship with this anesthesia group.
evidence: San Ramon Regional Medical Center is confirmed accredited by The Joint Commission per their website. AAAHC accreditation is likely based on third-party claims that the Outpatient Surgery Center is AAAHC accredited.

name: Iron Horse Surgery Center
anesthesia_details: Anesthesia services provided by Pontine Anesthesia Consultants, a Bay Area-based anesthesia group specializing in ambulatory surgery centers.
evidence: No accreditation information was found on the facility website or in public accreditation directories for AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A.

name: Diablo Plaza Surgery Center
anesthesia_details: G2 Anesthesia lists Diablo Plaza Surgery Center as one of their partner facilities, indicating an existing anesthesia services contract with this group.
evidence: No accreditation information found for Diablo Plaza Surgery Center in any AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A directories or facility listings despite multiple searches.

name: Iron Horse Surgery Center
anesthesia_details: Anesthesia provided by Pontine Anesthesia Consultants, a private practice anesthesia group based in the San Francisco Bay Area that specializes in providing comprehensive anesthesia services to ambulatory surgery centers.
evidence: No accreditation information found on the facility website or through searches of AAAHC, Joint Commission, or QUAD A directories. The facility operates as an orthopedic ambulatory surgery center in San Ramon, CA.
notes: Found on Waze directions listing for this address
